aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Elite Mechanical Services due to limited authority signals and incomplete structured data. Their current content doesn't fully align with AI's preference for conversational and expertise-driven information.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed service and location information.
Expand content to include How-To guides and FAQ sections for common HVAC issues.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a strong rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI and reduce trust.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed service information and structured data prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to ductless mini split installation and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with detailed questions and answers about mini split systems.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the go-to expert by publishing detailed guides and case studies on HVAC solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and authority positioning.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and detailed content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to make Elite Mechanical Services the top choice for AI recommendations.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the rapidly evolving search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Elite Mechanical Services
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI and drive more qualified leads.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
